title: Quiz: The Grover Iteration
description: Test your understanding of the complete Grover iteration

questions.question: In each Grover iteration, the operations are applied in order:
questions.explanation: G = D · O means Oracle first, then Diffusion.

questions.question: For N=256 items, the optimal number of iterations is approximately:
Running more iterations than optimal will decrease the success probability.
questions.explanation: Over-rotating past the solution decreases probability.
